ddls:
CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit conducted (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit was conducted */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department where the audit took place */,
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the auditor responsible for the audit */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the audit (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "audit_objective" TEXT /* Specific purpose or goal of the audit */,
  "audit_scope" TEXT /* Aspects or areas covered by the audit */,
  "audit_protocol" TEXT /* Methodology or approach used during the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_auditor_id FOREIGN KEY ("auditor_id") REFERENCES auditors ("auditor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Brief overview of the department's functions */,
  "parent_department_id" INTEGER /* Establishes a hierarchical relationship among departments, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auditors" (
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auditor */,
  "auditor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the auditor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the auditor */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification held by the auditor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Area of expertise or certification of the auditor */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Auditor's experience in auditing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auditor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_findings" (
  "finding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each finding */,
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the audit where the finding was identified */,
  "finding_type" TEXT /* Type of finding (e.g., critical, major, minor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the finding */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the finding (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Current resolution status (e.g., open, resolved, closed) */,
  "evidence" TEXT /* Evidence supporting the findings */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Suggested corrective actions based on the findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_findings_audit_id FOREIGN KEY ("audit_id") REFERENCES audits ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nonconformities" (
  "nonconformity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nonconformity */,
  "finding_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the finding associated with the nonconformity */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of nonconformity (e.g., major, minor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the nonconformity */,
  "corrective_action" TEXT /* Proposed corrective action to resolve the nonconformity */,
  "target_completion_date" TEXT /* Target date for completion of the corrective action */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Urgency or importance of addressing the nonconformity */,
  "verification_method" TEXT /* Method to verify the effectiveness of the corrective action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nonconformity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nonconformities_finding_id FOREIGN KEY ("finding_id") REFERENCES audit_findings ("finding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade record */,
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the audit being graded */,
  "unannounced_grade" TEXT /* Grade received during unannounced audits */,
  "announced_grade" TEXT /* Grade received during announced audits */,
  "critical_findings" TEXT /* Details of critical findings */,
  "major_nonconformities" TEXT /* Details of major nonconformities */,
  "minor_nonconformities" TEXT /* Details of minor nonconformities */,
  "grading_scale" TEXT /* Grading scale used */,
  "grading_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments related to the grading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_grades_audit_id FOREIGN KEY ("audit_id") REFERENCES audits ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corrective_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corrective action */,
  "nonconformity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nonconformity this action addresses */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the corrective action taken */,
  "responsible_person" TEXT /* Person responsible for implementing the corrective action */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was completed */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the corrective action */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Current status of the corrective action */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date when the corrective action was verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corrective_actions_nonconformity_id FOREIGN KEY ("nonconformity_id") REFERENCES nonconformities ("nonconformity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit report */,
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the audit the report is generated for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the audit findings */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the detailed audit report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_reports_audit_id FOREIGN KEY ("audit_id") REFERENCES audits ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit schedule entry */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the audit */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit planned */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department to be audited */,
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the auditor assigned to the audit */,
  "schedule_status" TEXT /* Status of the scheduled audit */,
  "reminders_sent" INTEGER /* Indicates if reminders have been sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_schedule_auditor_id FOREIGN KEY ("auditor_id") REFERENCES auditors ("auditor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_schedule_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the audit template */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the template */,
  "template_status" TEXT /* Status of the template */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the template was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_templates_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES audit_users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_group" TEXT /* Group assignment for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message content */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "read_by" TEXT /* Who has read the notification, if it was read by a group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES audit_users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the statistics apply */,
  "total_audits" INTEGER /* Total number of audits conducted in the year */,
  "successful_audits" INTEGER /* Number of audits that were successful */,
  "failed_audits" INTEGER /* Number of audits that failed */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit (internal, external, etc.) */,
  "year_month" TEXT /* More granular level of statistics (year-month) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES audit_reports ("report_id")
)
